label: Glasslock Stores
description: Glasslock Stores serves as Vanehouse Passage’s sealed stowage annex, constructed as a matte-black compartment with doubled gaskets and a dogged hatch to prevent glass-dust infiltration. Ribbed deck plates drop into gridded catch-trays, while grounded conductor-strips bind shelving frames to the Prismwake’s discharge system and keep the air sharply ozonated. Narrow copper-white heading bands filter through slit prisms above the racks, turning labels and compartment numbers into high-contrast markers. A recessed scupper cistern at the aft bulkhead receives sweepings and trapped particulates for later disposal over the twilight sea.
